title: potentilla × insularis
intro: Potentilla × insularis, also known as the Island Potentilla or Corsican Potentilla, is a hybrid shrub that belongs to the rose family and is a cross between Potentilla atrosanguinea and Potentilla rupestris. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × insularis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Potentilla × insularis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin conditions, or taken as a supplement to boost the immune system.
